children.heading: Filing of petition for review
children.label: 1 Filing of petition for review
children.text: The Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System may obtain review of any rule or determination referred to in subsection (a) in the United States Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit by filing in the court, not later than 60 days after the date of publication of the rule or determination, a written petition requesting that the rule or determination be set aside. Any proceeding to challenge any such rule or determination shall be expedited by the court.

children.heading: Transmittal of petition and record
children.label: 2 Transmittal of petition and record
children.text: A copy of a petition described in paragraph (1) shall be transmitted as soon as possible by the Clerk of the court to an officer or employee of the Commodity Futures Trading Commission designated for that purpose. Upon receipt of the petition, the Commission shall file with the court the rule or determination under review and any documents referred to therein, and any other relevant materials prescribed by the court.

children.heading: Exclusive jurisdiction
children.label: 3 Exclusive jurisdiction
children.text: On the date of the filing of a petition under paragraph (1), the court shall have jurisdiction, which shall become exclusive on the filing of the materials set forth in paragraph (2), to affirm and enforce or to set aside the rule or determination at issue.

children.label: A
children.text: the subject product is predominantly a banking product; and

children.label: B
children.text: making the provision or provisions of the Commodity Exchange Act [ et seq.] at issue applicable to the subject instrument is appropriate in light of the history, purpose, and extent of regulation under such Act, sections 27 to 27f of this title, and under the appropriate banking laws, giving deference neither to the views of the Commodity Futures Trading Commission nor the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System.7 U.S.C. 1

children.heading: Judicial stay
children.label: 5 Judicial stay
children.text: The filing of a petition by the Board pursuant to paragraph (1) shall operate as a judicial stay, until the date on which the determination of the court is final (including any appeal of the determination).

children.heading: Other authority to challenge
children.label: 6 Other authority to challenge
children.text: Any aggrieved party may seek judicial review pursuant to section 6(c) of the Commodity Exchange Act [] of a determination or rulemaking by the Commodity Futures Trading Commission under this section.7 U.S.C. 9
